lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: What is it, human? Speak and begone, your presence disgusts me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, uh, I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: Stop your muttering and get to the point!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: W-Who are you?

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: I am the Voice of Yama.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yama?

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: Yama is my master, a powerful demon of fire.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why can't Yama speak for themself?

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: Currently my master resides below us, building strength. Worry not, human, my master will eventually own your soul too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be leaving now.

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: I suspect you should.

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: The arrogant human finally arrives...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Upset that I disrupted your plans?

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: Disgusting. My master, the great demon Yama, wishes to speak with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yama wants to speak with me? How do you know that? You shouldn't even be able to talk to him.

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: My master wishes to have the satisfaction of explaining that to you himself. For this, I envy him. I will make do with the idiotic expression you wear presently.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I planted the device! Your connection should be severed!

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: Silence, human! You will make no demands of me. Proceed to my master's domain and speak with him yourself if you desire an answer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'd rather stay here.

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: Weakness! Cowardice! Disgusting. Begone, human!

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: Proceed or begone, human. I will not bear your foul presence any longer than is necessary.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the infernal shale mine before signing the initial contract with Yama

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: You may not go where you please without my master's blessing, human. Step back.

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: What is it, human? Speak and begone, your presence disgusts me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, uh, I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: Stop your muttering and get to the point!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: W-Who are you?

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: I am the Voice of Yama.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yama?

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: Yama is my master, a powerful demon of fire.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why can't Yama speak for themself?

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: Currently my master resides below us, building strength. Worry not, human, my master will eventually own your soul too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be leaving now.

lines.speaker: Voice of Yama
lines.text: I suspect you should.
